property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testLoginPageElements

testcase.system-err: [main] INFO org.testng.internal.Utils - [XmlSuite] [WARN] 'parallel' value 'false' is no longer valid, defaulting to 'none'. [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 142.0.7444.175 (resolved driver for Chrome 142) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\2269240\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\142.0.7444.175\chromedriver.exe Mar 10, 2026 4:59:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 142 Mar 10, 2026 4:59:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 142.0.7444.176. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
